security.csp: default-src 'self' blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src 'self' blob: data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://unpkg.com https://tessdata.projectnaptha.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.longDescription: thepdf.ink provides professional PDF tools that run entirely on your device. Merge, split, annotate, sign, fill forms, redact, find and replace, and more — no account, no cloud, no uploads. One-time purchase, yours forever.
